title: July 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 14''' is the 195th day (196th in leap years) of the year, with 170 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Alex Tavoularis]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Dorothée]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Kristy Wright]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Phoebe Waller-Bridge]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars Insider 50|''Star Wars Insider'' 50]] released for subscribers.
*[[2004]] – [[Empire 22|''Empire'' 22]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Alan Hume]] dies.
*[[2021]] – [[War of the Bounty Hunters 2|''War of the Bounty Hunters'' 2]] published.
*2021 – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 12|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 12]] published.
*[[2022]] – [[Star Wars: Hyperspace Lounge|''Star Wars'': Hyperspace Lounge]] opened.
*[[2026]] – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures — The Complete Phase III Part 2]]'' to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: Visions: Tsukumo]]'' to be published.
